mapper.select: -- 查看不同域下，每个三级指标均分 SELECT avgs.vehicle_name, avgs.function_id, avgs.plan_detail_name index_name, avgs.tertiary_metric function_name, avgs.count, avgs.avg_score `value`, COALESCE(w.weight, 1.0) AS weight, -- 计算加权值：均分 × 权重 avgs.avg_score * COALESCE(w.weight, 1.0) AS weighted_score FROM ( -- 步骤1: 计算每个车辆、问题类型下各三级指标的均分 SELECT v.vehicle_name, tc.function_id, tc.tertiary_metric, COUNT(ts.id) count, pd.plan_detail_name, AVG(ts.score) AS avg_score FROM test_state ts JOIN test_case tc ON ts.testcase_id = tc.id JOIN test_record tr ON ts.record_id = tr.id JOIN plan_detail pd on tc.function_id = pd.id JOIN vehicle v ON v.id = tr.vehicle_id WHERE (ts.is_successful = 1 or ts.is_successful = 0) -- 只统计成功的测试 and tr.id = #{vehicleId} and tc.tertiary_metric in ("自然语言理解（NLU）准确率", "表达拟人度", "人设鲜明度", "信息提取能力", "语言推理能力", "跨语言理解能力", "文化伦理", "通识知识", "安全性", "跨域协作能力") -- and tc.function_id > 7 and ts.score!=0 GROUP BY v.vehicle_name, tc.function_id, tc.tertiary_metric, pd.plan_detail_name ) AS avgs -- 关联权重表（严格按问题类型和三级指标匹配） LEFT JOIN tertiary_metric_weight w ON w.type = avgs.function_id -- 匹配问题类型 AND w.tertiary_metric = avgs.tertiary_metric -- 匹配三级指标
